findings.description: TableRow base component has cursor-pointer globally — misleading for rows without click handler. DataTable uses own <tr> so no current impact.
Node CPU/Mem progress bars don't clamp value to 100 (pods do). Radix handles overflow gracefully but explicit Math.min would be cleaner.
Progress component has redundant className merge: bg-primary/20 immediately overridden by bg-white/10.
